entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop studied for production and adaptation in Ethiopia

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The primary measure of productivity for the chickpea crop

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shifts projected to alter growing conditions and reduce crop yields

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climate-related stress causing substantial reduction in grain yield

entities.name: CROPGRO-CHICKPEA MODEL
entities.description: A simulation model used to evaluate climate change impacts and adaptation options

entities.name: SIRINKA
entities.description: A study site in North-Eastern Ethiopia

entities.name: CHEFA
entities.description: A study site in North-Eastern Ethiopia

entities.name: NORTH-EASTERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The semi-arid region where the study was conducted

entities.name: CO2 FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The direct effect of increased atmospheric carbon dioxide on plant growth and yield

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: An adaptation option involving the addition of water to crops to increase yield

entities.name: MATURITY GROUPS
entities.description: Classification of cultivars based on the duration of their growth cycle

entities.name: SHORT DURATION CULTIVAR
entities.description: A cultivar with a shorter growth cycle used as an adaptation option

entities.name: LONG DURATION CULTIVAR
entities.description: A cultivar with a longer growth cycle

entities.name: STANDARD CULTIVAR
entities.description: The control cultivar used as a baseline for comparison

relationships.description: increases yield at Sirinka but decreases at Chefa
decreases yield compared to standard cultivar
